Not Ready For Delivery - Payment Request.text: BOCONCEPT WAREHOUSE - Hi {customer_name}, we understand that you are not yet ready for your delivery. We are happy to hold your furniture until you are ready, and ask that you make the outstanding payment of {balance_payable} for order {order_number}. Please click the link to pay securely: {stripe_checkout_url}

Ready for Delivery - Payment.text: Hi {customer_name}, just a reminder that payment for order {order_number} of {balance_payable} is outstanding. Payment link: {stripe_checkout_url}

Delivery notice.text: BOCONCEPT WAREHOUSE: Hi {customer_name}, your order {order_number} is due to arrive in our Brisbane warehouse within the next few days. For priority delivery booking, please reply 'ready for delivery'. Order: {order_number}

General notice.text: Hi {customer_name}, this is an update regarding order {order_number}.
